tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a BDD feature file and verifies that the documentation output is rendered, downloadable, and structurally valid with at least one named test containing a description and coverage array.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1+ tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty description and test_coverage array

tests.test_name: BDD - PO - data-driven produces multiple tests
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven BDD feature file and verifies that the output correctly expands into three or more individually named tests.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: BDD - PO - data-driven produces multiple tests
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'bdd_datadriven_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Panel title is "Documentation" when no add-ons are selected
tests.journey: A Product Owner documents a BDD feature file without any add-ons selected and verifies that the output panel title is 'Documentation' and not the combined 'Documentation and Analysis' label.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Panel title is "Documentation" when no add-ons are selected
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with no add-ons selected
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is visible and its title is 'Documentation', not 'Documentation and Analysis'

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a BDD feature file and verifies that the output includes the source filename, a valid downloadable JSON with no unresolved values, and a correctly structured coverage matrix for the BDD format.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'bdd' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows the filename 'bdd_sample.feature'; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values; the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array whose rows conform to the BDD schema
